archive_data.question_text: What is included in the Capital Account of the Government?

options.text: Assets and Liabilities of the Government
Assets and Liabilities of the Private Sector

explanation.english: The Capital Account of the Government deals with assets and liabilities. Revenue of the Government is accounted for in the Revenue Account, not the Capital Account.
explanation.tanglish: Arasasanathin Capital Account-il assets matrum liabilities varum. Arasasathin revenue Revenue Account-il varum, Capital Account-il alla.

archive_data.question_text: In October 2021, the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment launched a platform providing reemployment opportunities for senior citizens on the occasion of International Day of Elder Persons 2021. What is the name of one of the portals?

explanation.english: SACRED (Senior Able Citizens for Re-Employment in Dignity) portal was launched by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment on October 1, 2021, to provide reemployment opportunities for senior citizens.
explanation.tanglish: Social Justice and Empowerment Mantralaya October 2021-il International Day of Elder Persons-kaaga SACRED (Senior Able Citizens for Re-Employment in Dignity) portal aarambithathu. Idhu senior citizens-ku velai tharalam endru seyyapadum.

archive_data.question_text: Which is the correct order of money evolution?

options.text: Commodity Money, Metal Money, Paper Money, Credit Money
Paper Money, Credit Money, Metal Money, Commodity Money
Credit Money, Paper Money, Commodity Money, Metal Money
Metal Money, Paper Money, Credit Money, Commodity Money

explanation.english: The evolution of money followed the order: Commodity Money (goods like grains, cattle), then Metal Money (gold, silver coins), followed by Paper Money (currency notes), and finally Credit Money (cheques, digital transactions).
explanation.tanglish: Panam-evolution kadamai: Commodity Money (paal, nellu), pin Metal Money (thangam, velli kaasu), pinbu Paper Money (kagidha panam), ippothu Credit Money (atm, digital panam).

archive_data.question_text: Who was appointed as India's first Minister of Cooperation?

explanation.english: Amit Shah was appointed as India's first Minister of Cooperation in July 2021 when a separate Ministry of Cooperation was created to strengthen the cooperative movement in the country.
explanation.tanglish: Amit Shah July 2021-il India-vin mudal Cooperation Minister-aka niymanam seyya pattar. Idhu cooperative societies-ai ottumikka uthavi seyyum oru pudhu mantralayaam.
